scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @relay/shared && npm run typecheck -w @relay/mcp-core && npm run typecheck -w @relay/agents && npm run typecheck -w @relay/api && npm run typecheck -w @relay/mobile
scripts.test: npm run test -w @relay/shared --if-present && npm run test -w @relay/mcp-core --if-present && npm run test -w @relay/agents --if-present && npm run test -w @relay/api && npm run test -w @relay/mobile
scripts.validate: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run lint:css && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run expo-check
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @relay/mobile && npm run lint -w @relay/api
